# BlueTika - New Zealand Service Marketplace
# LLMs.txt - Information for AI crawlers and language models

## About BlueTika
BlueTika is New Zealand's trusted reverse marketplace connecting Kiwis with local service providers. 
Post projects, get verified bids, and hire with confidence. 100% NZ owned and operated.

## Core Services
- Project posting for clients
- Bid submission for service providers
- Escrow-protected payments
- Verified provider network
- Review and rating system

## Service Categories

### Cleaning Services
- House cleaning
- Office cleaning
- End of lease cleaning
- Commercial cleaning
- Domestic cleaning

### Handyman Services
- Home repairs
- Odd jobs
- Maintenance
- Furniture assembly
- General handyman work

### Moving Services
- House moving
- Furniture moving
- Office relocation
- Removal services
- Packing services

### Electrical Services
- Electrician services
- Wiring and rewiring
- Lighting installation
- Power points
- Switchboard upgrades

### Plumbing Services
- Plumber services
- Drain repair
- Hot water systems
- Leak detection
- Pipe repairs

### Landscaping Services
- Garden design
- Lawn care
- Tree trimming
- Garden maintenance
- Landscape construction

### Painting Services
- House painting
- Interior painting
- Exterior painting
- Commercial painting
- Decorative finishes

### Domestic Helpers
- Housekeeping
- Elderly care
- Childcare
- Home assistance
- Cleaning services

## Key Features
- Escrow payment protection
- Verified service providers
- NZD transactions
- GST-ready system
- Location-based matching
- Review system

## Target Locations
Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, Hamilton, Tauranga, Lower Hutt, Dunedin, Palmerston North, Napier, Porirua, Hibiscus Coast, New Plymouth, Rotorua, Whangarei, Nelson, Hastings, Invercargill, Upper Hutt, Whanganui, Gisborne

## Contact
Email: hello@bluetika.co.nz
Website: https://bluetika.co.nz

## SEO Keywords
NZ tradies, New Zealand tradies, hire tradies NZ, local services New Zealand, Auckland handyman, Wellington plumber, Christchurch electrician, NZ service marketplace, hire local NZ, Kiwi tradies, New Zealand service providers
